text:
Once upon a time in an old forest lived a clever duck called Felix. Every morning he would glide across the pond with his webbed feet. One morning he decided to have an adventure. Felix looked down into the water below and saw bright shells. He decided to search for them.

With his quack he searched high and low for shells. He quacked softly under bushes instead of loud. After a while he saw some shiny things. Felix quacked softly again and plucked an orange one. He quacked happily!

But there were more shells than just oranges. Felix saw lots of green ones. He quacked happily dancing on little stones.

Then he heard something squiggling. Curious he pecked along the edge. There were tiny snails. He grabbed lots of them with his bill. He quacked happily scooping them.

After snacks he flew high above the trees. That evening he floated on his back under the stars.

Then Felix had another idea. He would help
